terms body paragraph 1: I hereby confirm that I am the person identified by the National ID number and have presented myself for identity verification at the registration point designated by the Department of Provincial Administration, in order to use the digital identity service of the Department of Provincial Administration, Ministry of Interior, for the purpose of conducting digital transactions with agencies authorized by the Department of Provincial Administration for identity verification. Any actions performed using this digital identity shall be deemed to have been carried out by me personally. These terms and conditions are governed by the applicable laws.
reservation of rights and limitation of: Reservation of Rights and Limitation of Liability
terms body paragraph 2: The Department of Provincial Administration cannot guarantee that the service will be free from delays or errors, whether caused by human factors, technical failures, or force majeure. I acknowledge these conditions and agree that in the event of any deficiency, the Department shall not be liable for any loss, damage, compensation, expenses, or damages.
terms body paragraph 3: The system will process identity verification based on information provided by the user in good faith and shall not be liable for any damages arising from false or inaccurate information provided by the user, including damages resulting from violation of others' personal rights due to the use of forged information or impersonation.
